rationale.R1.3: The rewritten section addresses the fundamental evidence/claim mismatch by rephrasing claims to match what was actually measured (in-distribution accuracy).
rationale.RX.1: The revised text flags uncertainty in the original claims of OOD robustness and emphasizes that the relevant question is whether the gains hold up under shift.
rationale.RX.3: The rewritten section mostly stays within scope, but with some drift towards more cautious language regarding deployment claims.
rationale.RX.4: The revised text avoids introducing new errors or fabrications and refrains from making unsubstantiated claims about safety-critical domains.
rationale.RX.5: The rewritten section annotates every non-cosmetic change with source and reason, including the addition of OOD benchmarks and the rephrasing of claims.
